New Listing

STELLAMAR — Overall: Cantiere Delle Marche RJ 115 2023
📍 Imperia, Imperia
View Online

STELLAMAR is a 2023 Cantiere delle Marche RJ115 — a World Superyacht Award-winning long-range explorer offering 5 staterooms for 12 guests, twin Caterpillar C18 ACERT engines, and an impressive 5,000+ nm at 10 knots range. Designed by Francesco Paszkowski with naval architecture by Hydro Tec, she combines award-winning Italian design with true ocean-crossing capability. Her full-beam master suite features an onboard spa with steam shower, infrared sauna, and freestanding bathtub. With CMC zero-speed stabilizers, dual Starlink, and a proven charter program, STELLAMAR is the ideal acquisition for an owner seeking both personal enjoyment and strong charter revenue.
